testcase.classname: Gestión de Problemas en Panel Administrativo
testcase.name: Crear problema y validar que se lista - <titulo> - Example #1.1

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for condition to not be valid: url to contain "/login". Current url: "http://localhost:8083/admin/login" (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.12.94+deb13-amd64', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 150.0.7871.46, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 150.0.7871.46 (5b586c06e0d2..., userDataDir: /tmp/org.chromium.Chromium....}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:46787}, goog:processID: 134399, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: linux, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:46787/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 150.0.7871.46, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 02bb76798e34aaae253160596055374e

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for condition to not be valid: url to contain "/login". Current url: "http://localhost:8083/admin/login" (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.12.94+deb13-amd64', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 150.0.7871.46, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 150.0.7871.46 (5b586c06e0d2..., userDataDir: /tmp/org.chromium.Chromium....}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:46787}, goog:processID: 134399, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: linux, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:46787/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 150.0.7871.46, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 02bb76798e34aaae253160596055374e at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at bo.juezvirtual.automation.utils.AdminProblemCleaner.loginAsAdmin(AdminProblemCleaner.java:81) at bo.juezvirtual.automation.utils.AdminProblemCleaner.deleteAllProblemsAsAdmin(AdminProblemCleaner.java:49) at bo.juezvirtual.automation.steps.Hooks.deleteProblemsBeforeCleanProblemsScenarios(Hooks.java:34)
testcase.system-out: Given el administrador navega a la pagina de login del panel................skipped When el administrador introduce el usuario "administrador_qa" y clave "administrador_qa".skipped Then el administrador deberia ver el dashboard administrativo...............skipped Given el docente esta en la pagina de creacion de problemas.................skipped When crea un problema con titulo "Suma de dos números", tiempo "2", memoria "128", autor "Patito QA" y descripciones basicas.skipped Then el problema deberia ser guardado con exito.............................skipped And el problema "Suma de dos números" deberia aparecer listado..............skipped

testcase.system-out: Given el administrador navega a la pagina de login del panel................skipped When el administrador introduce el usuario "administrador_qa" y clave "administrador_qa".skipped Then el administrador deberia ver el dashboard administrativo...............skipped Given el docente esta en la pagina de creacion de problemas.................skipped When crea un problema con titulo "Invertir una cadena", tiempo "1", memoria "128", autor "Patito QA" y descripciones basicas.skipped Then el problema deberia ser guardado con exito.............................skipped And el problema "Invertir una cadena" deberia aparecer listado..............skipped
